title: QuoteResponse Structure
description: JSON Structure for QuoteResponse from Uniswap Trading API

requestId.description: A unique ID for the request.

routing.description: The routing for the proposed transaction.

value.description: The quantity of ETH tokens approved for spending by the transaction, denominated in wei. Note that by default Uniswap Labs sets this to the maximum approvable spend.

permitData.description: the permit2 message object for the customer to sign to permit spending by the permit2 contract.

permitGasFee.description: The total estimated gas cost of this transaction (eg. `gasLimit` multiplied by `maxFeePerGas`) in the base unit of the chain.

sponsorshipInfo.description: Gas sponsorship information for the quoted swap. When `sponsored` is `true`, gas fees for executing this swap will be covered by the `sponsor`. When `sponsored` is `false`, `rejectionReason` describes why sponsorship was not granted.

sponsored.description: Whether gas for this swap is sponsored.

rejectionReason.description: Reason gas sponsorship was not granted. Present only when `sponsored` is `false`.
